meta.fictional_disclosure: This exhibit uses synthetic source records and fictional entities for demonstration.

credit.label: Credit mandate
credit.source_shape: Versioned liquid and private-credit observations at native frequency.

hedge-fund.label: Hedge-fund composite
hedge-fund.source_shape: Versioned composite returns, terms, and predecessor evidence.

private-market.label: Private-market drawdown vehicle
private-market.source_shape: Irregular cash flows and versioned quarterly NAV evidence.

public-equity.label: Public-equity registered vehicle
public-equity.source_shape: Versioned public vehicle returns with benchmark and FX evidence.

credit|early|audit.conclusion: The point-in-time audit emits 1 receipted vintage findings.
credit|early|audit.limitation: Versioned liquid and private-credit observations at native frequency. Only evidence knowable at the early decision cutoff is used. Documented lineage is not evidence that historical skill transferred.

refusals.detail: S7 reconstructs lineage and basis-qualified panels; it does not estimate alpha, Sharpe, IRR, PME, skill, or manager ranking.

credit|early|audit.what_changed: The audit compares latest-known and all-known versions at the same cutoff. Only evidence knowable at the early decision cutoff is used.

credit|early|basis.conclusion: The representative native panel is refused after exact basis and row-reconciliation gates.
credit|early|basis.limitation: Versioned liquid and private-credit observations at native frequency. Only evidence knowable at the early decision cutoff is used. Documented lineage is not evidence that historical skill transferred.

refusals.detail: S7 reconstructs lineage and basis-qualified panels; it does not estimate alpha, Sharpe, IRR, PME, skill, or manager ranking.

credit|early|basis.what_changed: The basis view shows source values, transforms, breaks, and panel disposition. Only evidence knowable at the early decision cutoff is used.

credit|early|lineage.limitation: Versioned liquid and private-credit observations at native frequency. Only evidence knowable at the early decision cutoff is used. Documented lineage is not evidence that historical skill transferred.

refusals.detail: S7 reconstructs lineage and basis-qualified panels; it does not estimate alpha, Sharpe, IRR, PME, skill, or manager ranking.

credit|early|lineage.what_changed: Entity ownership and predecessor evidence are shown at the selected cutoff. Only evidence knowable at the early decision cutoff is used.
